name: EXPORT_REPAIR_METHOD_LOCK_v1
scope: MetaBlooms full project-file ZIP repair/export in ChatGPT Linux sandbox
problem_class: large ZIP extraction/copy stalls in sandbox
hardlink candidate mutates trusted source archive
overlong ZIP member paths fail native filesystem extraction with File name too long
normal python startup may be slow; use python3 -S for stdlib-only ZIP streaming

forbidden_methods.method: hardlink archive candidate from authority ZIP
forbidden_methods.reason: Hard links share the same inode. Updating the candidate also mutates the authority archive. This destroyed source/candidate separation in the failed attempt.

forbidden_methods.method: full filesystem extraction before portability filtering
forbidden_methods.reason: Overlong member names can fail extraction with ENAMETOOLONG before repair can occur.
Normal python startup/tool hooks can be slow or flaky in this sandbox. Use python3 -S and bounded stdlib-only stages.

preferred_method.summary: Stream-rebuild ZIP member-by-member from verified source authorities using python3 -S zipfile, overlay boot/split members, deterministically rename overlong paths before extraction, then validate sidecar, CRC, duplicate paths, inode independence, manifest presence, and extraction smoke.
steps: Verify SHA-256 sidecars for every input ZIP before trusting content.
Never use hard links for candidate archives; prove candidate inode is independent from all source archives.
If reflink/copy-on-write is supported, it may be used only after proving independent inode behavior; otherwise use independent byte-copy or stream-rebuild.
Prefer stream rebuild with python3 -S and zipfile when archive extraction/copy is slow or path-portability defects are expected.
Read source ZIP members directly and write them into a new candidate ZIP; do not extract the full tree first.
Apply deterministic portability renames for overlong member paths and write a rename manifest into the ZIP.
Overlay minimal boot/runtime-critical authority after full-runtime baseline, then overlay split/final authority package metadata.
Write repair receipt and handoff into the candidate ZIP before final hashing.
Write SHA-256 sidecar after candidate is final; verify sidecar matches the file.
Run a bounded native extraction smoke only after overlong paths have been filtered/renamed.
Promote only if all gates pass.

promotion_rule: Future full export repair stages must use this method or prove with artifacts why a different method is safer. Any attempt to use hardlink candidates is blocked by policy.
chat_lesson: The working method was discovered after user escalation; the lesson must be persisted as artifact policy so future turns do not repeat the blocked methods.
